description.en: Curse a foe with creeping rot that dulls their strikes and unsteadies their aim for a while.
description.cs: Prokleje nepřítele plíživou hnilobou, která mu na chvíli oslabí údery i mušku.

to_target.self: you whisper a dark word and a sickly grey shimmer settles over {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} whispers a dark word and a sickly grey shimmer settles over {target}.

to_target.self: zašeptáš temné slovo a chorobně šedý třpyt se usadí na {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} zašeptá temné slovo a chorobně šedý třpyt se usadí na {target}.
